scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n shared,api,web -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @alr/shared" "npm run dev --workspace @alr/api" "npm run dev --workspace @alr/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @alr/shared && npm run build --workspace @alr/api && npm run build --workspace @alr/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @alr/shared && npm run test --workspace @alr/api
scripts.lint: npm run build --workspace @alr/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @alr/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @alr/web
